title: Unshifting the Infield: Spatial Out-Probabilities in the Post-Shift Era
description: Leveraged Bayesian Additive Regression Trees in PyMC to model infield out-probabilities (0.86 held-out ROC-AUC), mapping the spatial impact of the 2023 MLB shift ban, and creating a shift-adjusted defensive range metric.

title: Hidden A Bayesian Approach to Modeling Arm-Injury Risk in Pitchers
description: Developed a Bayesian hierarchical model in PyMC to forecast the latent arm-injury risk and burden for # MLB pitchers. Created an interactive dashboard to visualize player uncertainty estimates.

title: Probabilistic Modeling of True Hitting Talent in Major League Baseball
description: Architected a probabilistic forecasting model utilizing a hierarchical Bayesian framework and Gaussian processes in NumPyro and JAX to project true-talent home run rates, improving out-of-sample prediction accuracy by over 31% against benchmark models. Developed a Streamlit dashboard to visualize home-run projections for 2026, providing a user-friendly interface for player-level HR distributions and uncertainty intervals.

title: Sean McVAI: Beating Two-High Coverage
description: Quantified the strategic risk and upside of offensive play designs by forecasting expected yardage gained with gradient boosted trees. Developed an interactive Streamlit dashboard integrating 2 predictive models for play design evaluation, presenting the tool to NFL analysts at the 2026 Football Analytics Blitz against 15 teams (~70 students).

title: Bayesball in the Outfield: Quantifying Defensive Aggression With a Bayesian Hierarchical Model
description: Implemented a hierarchical Bayesian framework in PyMC to formulate a defensive baseball metric, estimating latent aggression rates from spatiotemporal tracking data. Earned honorable mention recognition as a Top 10 finalist among 50 teams (114 students) in the 2025 SMT Data Challenge.

title: The Effect of Two Strikes on a Hitter's Swing
description: Created an interactive website using Python and D3.js, utilizing 700,000+ MLB Statcast records, to analyze relationships between deviations in swing mechanics and offensive outcomes in high-pressure contexts.

title: Hidden What Is a Home Worth? Large-Scale Ensemble Learning for U.S. Housing Prices
description: Architected a predictive pricing pipeline for 2.2M+ U.S. properties, synthesizing heterogeneous data sources (crime, tax, demographics) into a gradient-boosting framework to capture complex market drivers.

title: Hidden Spotify Popularity Analysis
description: A statistical analysis on 100,000+ Spotify tracks to identify key audio features linked to song popularity.

title: Hidden Power Outages Statistical Analysis
description: Developed a Random Forest regressor to forecast regional energy consumption, utilizing permutation tests and NMAR analysis to quantify statistical dependencies between electricity sales and peak demand loss.

title: Hidden PSCL Interactive Dashboard
description: The interactive Looker Studio dashboard that provides a user-friendly interface for coaches and players to track their performances and showcase their abilities to college scouts for the PSCL.
